notes:
Honest generation_config across chat + image, plus refreshed Swift v2 beta:
- Chat path verified end-to-end — every new chat reads the model's generation_config.json on creation, stores sampling defaults (temp/top_p/top_k/min_p/repeat_penalty) as chat overrides, caps overly-creative temperatures (>0.7 → 0.7) and applies a mild 1.1 repetition penalty floor to prevent token loops on low-bit JANG quants. Both Chat Completions and Responses API wire paths honor these overrides. Chat Settings UI reads generation_config on open and the Reset button re-seeds from it.
- Image path fixed — guidance was hardcoded 3.5 for every model. Now per-model canonical defaults: Schnell 0 (distilled, guidance is a no-op), Z-Image-Turbo 1.0, Dev/Klein 3.5, Qwen Image / Qwen Image Edit 4.0, Kontext 2.5, Fill 30 (inpainting needs strong guidance). `shared/imageModels.ts` now carries `guidance: number` alongside `steps`, `getDefaultGuidance(modelId)` helper added, ImageTab applies per-model defaults on model-switch and preserves user-saved values on session restore.
- Swift v2 beta refreshed — bundled alongside `vMLX.app` inside the DMG. Drag either to /Applications.

Credits — thanks again to Sándor Dobi (@SandorDobi) for PR #99 (lm-evaluation-harness + OpenAI-compatible logprobs).
